compiled_state.title: Implement brainstorm gate hook, dispatcher, plugin registration, and config key
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Dispatcher file exists at plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh
- [ ] Dispatcher is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh
- [ ] hook_brainstorm_gate function exists in session-misc-functions.sh
  Verify: grep -q "hook_brainstorm_gate" plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh
- [ ] Hook checks for session-scoped sentinel at ARTIFACTS_DIR/brainstorm-sentinel-<session_id>
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm-sentinel" plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh
- [ ] plugin.json has EnterPlanMode matcher in PreToolUse section
  Verify: grep -q "EnterPlanMode" plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
- [ ] dso-config.conf has brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate key
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate" .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Hook returns exit 2 (block) when sentinel absent and config enabled
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -qv "FAIL"
- [ ] Hook returns exit 0 (allow) when sentinel present
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -qv "FAIL"

## Implementation Details
1. Add hook_brainstorm_gate() to plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh following the hook_plan_review_gate pattern:
   - Extract tool_name from input JSON via parse_json_field
   - Only act on EnterPlanMode tool calls
   - Read brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate from dso-config.conf (default: true); if false, return 0
   - Check for sentinel at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/brainstorm-sentinel-* (session-scoped by session_id extracted from hook input)
   - If sentinel missing: return exit 2 with message directing agent to invoke /dso:brainstorm
   - If sentinel present: return exit 0
2. Create plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh following pre-exitplanmode.sh pattern exactly
3. Register EnterPlanMode matcher in plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json PreToolUse section
4. Add brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate=true to .claude/dso-config.conf

Note: plugin.json registration and dispatcher must land in the same commit to prevent a window where plugin.json references a non-existent dispatcher.

## TDD Requirement
RED tests from task e337-998e must pass (GREEN) after this implementation.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh (create)
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh (modify)
- plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (modify)
- .claude/dso-config.conf (modify)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Files read ✓ — pre-exitplanmode.sh, session-misc-functions.sh, plugin.json, dso-config.conf, deps.sh. Tests confirmed RED (6 FAIL, exit 127). Ready to implement.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Implementation complete ✓ — hook_brainstorm_gate added to session-misc-functions.sh, pre-enterplanmode.sh dispatcher created and executable, plugin.json updated with EnterPlanMode matcher, dso-config.conf updated with brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate=true
comments.author: Main

Files modified: plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh (+hook_brainstorm_gate), plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-enterplanmode.sh (created), plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (+EnterPlanMode matcher), .claude/dso-config.conf (+brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate=true)

comments.body: Fixed: Brainstorm gate hook, dispatcher, plugin registration, and config key implemented
